name: Acme SaaS
product: Inventory management for SMB retailers. Syncs stock across Shopify, Amazon, and in-store POS. Real-time updates, low-cost.

features.name: Multi-channel Sync
features.differentiator: Real-time, sub-minute sync; no competitor offers this at our price

features.name: Custom Reports
features.differentiator: Template library; non-technical users can build dashboards

targetMarket: US SMB retailers, 10-500 SKUs, doing $500k-$5M revenue. Owner-operator or small ops team.
competitors: CompetitorA: Enterprise-focused, expensive, overkill for SMB
CompetitorB: Cheaper but slow sync, poor support
monetization: Freemium. Free up to 100 SKUs. Starter $29/mo, Pro $99/mo, Enterprise custom.
currentChannels: SEO and content marketing (blog, guides) — primary
Paid: tested, CAC too high for current LTV
uniqueConstraints: Bootstrapped, 5-person team. No sales team. Product-led only.
notes: Focus on product-led growth. Need to improve activation — many sign up but don't complete first sync.
